html:
These items can be placed on a Table and acts like the vase on the End Table. The player can place any kind of Flower in the Vase. This includes Lune Tree Blossoms, Light Bulbs, Glow Berries and Forget-Me-Lots. Planted Flowers, Lune Tree Blossoms and Forget-Me-Lots will not wither and can stay forever. However, Light Bulbs and Glow Berries, although they can provide light, will wither after 10 days.

Table Vase

Exclusive to:

EmptyFresh LightGenericOld LightWilted

The Table Vase is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced within the From Beyond updates. It can be crafted in the Decorations Filter or Carpentry Filter with 2 Logs and 1 Rope and requires a Sawhorse to prototype.

A full Table Vase will always show a rose in the inventory, no matter what kind of flower it contains.

Replica Sanctum Vase

Replica Sanctum Vase can be unlocked by the Distilled Knowledge from Orange Fountain of Knowledge. To access it, players have to finish Sequitor's Puzzle first.

Replica Sanctum Planter

Replica Sanctum Planter can be unlocked by the Distilled Knowledge from Orange Fountain of Knowledge. To access it, players have to finish Sequitor's Puzzle first.

Tips

  • Because the Table Vase can also be placed on the ground, it can be used as a cheap way to light up areas, as a placed Light Bulb will provide Light for 10 days and can be refilled with only one Light Bulb after withering.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Distinguished Spooky Stump Vase Issued for free on the eve of Halloween in 2023.
Woven - Distinguished
Decorator's Collection
Artisanal Vase
Handcrafted to hold your favorite flowers.
Woven - Distinguished
Fantasmical Collection
Blooming Vase
An enchanting way to display your bouquet.
Woven - Distinguished
Hallowed Nighst Collection
Spooky Stump Vase
Add a spooky touch to your floral arrangement.
Woven - Distinguished
Parlor's Collection
Parlor Vase
A simple vase that lets your flowers take center stage.
Woven - Distinguished
Cawnival Collection
Cawnival Vase
Let the festivities shine on through the night!
Woven - Distinguished
Rose Collection
A Singular Vase
A single rose for simplistic beauty.

Trivia

  • The Table Vase was introduced in the Host of Horrors update.
  • If you try to burn a vase with a flower, the flower will immediately wither. To get a wilted flower in a vase instantly, you can first set the vase on fire with a torch, and then extinguish it with a watering can.
  • At the beginning all flowers in a Table Vase were wilting after 10 days. This was changed in a hotfix shortly after the release of the Host of Horrors update to only affect Light Bulbs and Glow Berries.

Assets

  • Table Vase Empty
  • Table Vase With Rose
  • Replica Sanctum Vase Dropped
  • Replica Sanctum Planter Dropped
  • Spooky Stump Vase Dropped
  • Parlor Vase Dropped
  • Cawnival Vase Dropped
  • A Singular Vase Dropped

Gallery

  • Table Vase on Round Wooden Table
  • able Vase all Flower variants
  • Table Vase all Flower variants withered
  • Table Vase concept art from Rhymes with Play
  • Table Vase skins concept art from Rhymes with Play

plainText:
These items can be placed on a Table and acts like the vase on the End Table. The player can place any kind of Flower in the Vase. This includes Lune Tree Blossoms, Light Bulbs, Glow Berries and Forget-Me-Lots. Planted Flowers, Lune Tree Blossoms and Forget-Me-Lots will not wither and can stay forever. However, Light Bulbs and Glow Berries, although they can provide light, will wither after 10 days.
Table Vase[edit | edit source]
Table Vase
Empty
With Rose
"A nice place to put all your fresh-cut flowers."
Empty
With Flower
With Dead Flower
Object Info
Perk
Can hold Flowers.
Can be placed on a Wooden Table.
Can be Burned
Does not stack

"decor_flowervase"
Exclusive to:
EmptyFresh LightGenericOld LightWilted
“A nice vase without any flowers.”
–Wilson, when examining an empty Table Vase.
“It's empty. Might as well burn it.”
–Willow, when examining an empty Table Vase.
“Wolfgang will be careful not to break.”
–Wolfgang, when examining an empty Table Vase.
“I feel the urge to stare into it.”
–Wendy, when examining an empty Table Vase.
“WHY DID WE MAKE THIS”
–WX-78, when examining an empty Table Vase.
“Ah, could use a doily, wouldn't you say?”
–Wickerbottom, when examining an empty Table Vase.
“It could use a bit of nature.”
–Woodie, when examining an empty Table Vase.
“An empty vessel awaiting decoration or light.”
–Maxwell, when examining an empty Table Vase.
“Empty. Shall we use it för target practice?”
–Wigfrid, when examining an empty Table Vase.
“Reminds me of antique shopping with mother.”
–Webber, when examining an empty Table Vase.
“We must replace these at once.”
–Warly, when examining an empty Table Vase.
“Needs friend for cup”
–Wormwood, when examining an empty Table Vase.
“Looks nice enough, but it feels kinda empty.”
–Winona, when examining an empty Table Vase.
“There's nothing placed within the vase.”
–Wortox, when examining an empty Table Vase.
“Think fish would look better in there than flower.”
–Wurt, when examining an empty Table Vase.
“Woby, did you eat the flower?”
–Walter, when examining an empty Table Vase.
“I thought I just replaced these. Or was that later?”
–Wanda, when examining an empty Table Vase.
“It's nice to have a little light.”
–Wilson, when examining a Table Vase with a light flower.
“Not as good as a fire, but at least we won't be in the dark.”
–Willow, when examining a Table Vase with a light flower.
“Wolfgang does not like dark.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Table Vase with a light flower.
“It's illuminating... for now.”
–Wendy, when examining a Table Vase with a light flower.
“MAXIMUM LIGHT OUTPUT”
–WX-78, when examining a Table Vase with a light flower.
“The more light to read by the better, in my opinion.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Table Vase with a light flower.
“Aboot time we brightened this place up, eh?”
–Woodie, when examining a Table Vase with a light flower.
“A temporary reprieve from the shadow.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Table Vase with a light flower.
“It burns bright.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Table Vase with a light flower.
“Nice and bright!”
–Webber, when examining a Table Vase with a light flower.
“Now we can all shine a little brighter.”
–Warly, when examining a Table Vase with a light flower.
“Light Friend looks good!”
–Wormwood, when examining a Table Vase with a light flower.
“It ain't a lamp, but it'll work.”
–Winona, when examining a Table Vase with a light flower.
“A light so bright I might still see at night!”
–Wortox, when examining a Table Vase with a light flower.
“Friendly little light.”
–Wurt, when examining a Table Vase with a light flower.
“Oooh, useful.”
–Walter, when examining a Table Vase with a light flower.
“Good as new.”
–Wanda, when examining a Table Vase with a light flower.
“A nice vase of flowers.”
–Wilson, when examining a Table Vase with a flower.
“Just a bunch of dumb flowers.”
–Willow, when examining a Table Vase with a flower.
“Pretty little flower.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Table Vase with a flower.
“We pulled the flowers from their homes for our own amusement.”
–Wendy, when examining a Table Vase with a flower.
“GOOD. NOW I CAN WATCH IT SLOWLY DIE”
–WX-78, when examining a Table Vase with a flower.
“It's pleasant to see a little decor out here.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Table Vase with a flower.
“A little bit of nature makes everything nicer.”
–Woodie, when examining a Table Vase with a flower.
“Purely decorative.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Table Vase with a flower.
“Saveth them för my funeral.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Table Vase with a flower.
“We like it!”
–Webber, when examining a Table Vase with a flower.
“Pretty, though I prefer flour.”
–Warly, when examining a Table Vase with a flower.
“Little home for little friend”
–Wormwood, when examining a Table Vase with a flower.
“Lookin' fresh as a daisy!”
–Winona, when examining a Table Vase with a flower.
“The space in the vase is filled with flowers.”
–Wortox, when examining a Table Vase with a flower.
“Glurgh. Have ugly flower in it.”
–Wurt, when examining a Table Vase with a flower.
“Careful with that, Woby.”
–Walter, when examining a Table Vase with a flower.
“Beautiful.”
–Wanda, when examining a Table Vase with a flower.
“I know I told Maxwell to replace the bulb.”
–Wilson, when examining a Table Vase with a weak light flower.
“We're gonna be in the dark soon.”
–Willow, when examining a Table Vase with a weak light flower.
“Please do not go out, little light.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Table Vase with a weak light flower.
“It, too, will die.”
–Wendy, when examining a Table Vase with a weak light flower.
“WARNING: POWER LOW”
–WX-78, when examining a Table Vase with a weak light flower.
“It is Maxwell's turn to procure bulbs. I've it written down right here.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Table Vase with a weak light flower.
“We need bulbs, eh.”
–Woodie, when examining a Table Vase with a weak light flower.
“I believe it is Wilson's turn to fetch bulbs.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Table Vase with a weak light flower.
“The light wanes.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Table Vase with a weak light flower.
“It's gonna go out soon.”
–Webber, when examining a Table Vase with a weak light flower.
“It's looking pretty dim.”
–Warly, when examining a Table Vase with a weak light flower.
“Sick, Light Friend?”
–Wormwood, when examining a Table Vase with a weak light flower.
“That's not gonna last much longer.”
–Winona, when examining a Table Vase with a weak light flower.
“I'll try not to pout when that light soon goes out.”
–Wortox, when examining a Table Vase with a weak light flower.
“Need new light.”
–Wurt, when examining a Table Vase with a weak light flower.
“We should find a fresh one, Woby!”
–Walter, when examining a Table Vase with a weak light flower.
“I swear I just replaced this.”
–Wanda, when examining a Table Vase with a weak light flower.
“Not looking very fresh.”
–Wilson, when examining a Table Vase with a wilted flower.
“Those need replacing.”
–Willow, when examining a Table Vase with a wilted flower.
“Little flowers are weaker than usual.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Table Vase with a wilted flower.
“I think it's lovelier this way...”
–Wendy, when examining a Table Vase with a wilted flower.
“EVEN THE SIMPLEST ORGANICS DIE”
–WX-78, when examining a Table Vase with a wilted flower.
“A pity. Shall we find replacements?”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Table Vase with a wilted flower.
“Well, that's that.”
–Woodie, when examining a Table Vase with a wilted flower.
“Every lovely flower must one day wilt.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Table Vase with a wilted flower.
“Beauty fades. Glöry is förever.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Table Vase with a wilted flower.
“They look sad.”
–Webber, when examining a Table Vase with a wilted flower.
“I'm sorry, Maman.”
–Warly, when examining a Table Vase with a wilted flower.
“Sick, Friend?”
–Wormwood, when examining a Table Vase with a wilted flower.
“I think it's time to retire this one.”
–Winona, when examining a Table Vase with a wilted flower.
“Tiny flower on the table... you aren't looking very stable.”
–Wortox, when examining a Table Vase with a wilted flower.
“Fish wouldn't get wilty like this, florp.”
–Wurt, when examining a Table Vase with a wilted flower.
“It looks sad.”
–Walter, when examining a Table Vase with a wilted flower.
“Fleeting.”
–Wanda, when examining a Table Vase with a wilted flower.
The Table Vase is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced within the From Beyond updates. It can be crafted in the Decorations Filter or Carpentry Filter with 2 Logs and 1 Rope and requires a Sawhorse to prototype.
A full Table Vase will always show a rose in the inventory, no matter what kind of flower it contains.

title: Table Vase
wikitext:
These items can be placed on a [[Table]] and acts like the vase on the [[End Table]]. The player can place any kind of [[Flower]] in the Vase. This includes [[Lune Tree Blossom]]s, [[Light Bulb]]s, [[Glow Berry|Glow Berries]] and [[Forget-Me-Lots]]. Planted Flowers, Lune Tree Blossoms and Forget-Me-Lots will not wither and can stay forever. To access it, players have to finish [[Sequitor's Puzzle]] first. {{clear}} __NOTOC__ == {{pic|32|Prototype}} Tips == * Because the Table Vase can also be placed on the ground, it can be used as a cheap way to light up areas, as a placed Light Bulb will provide Light for 10 days and can be refilled with only one Light Bulb after withering. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Table_Vase-0|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Distinguished Spooky Stump Vase''' Issued for free on the eve of Halloween in 2023.
{{SkinInfo |image = Artisanal Vase Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Decorator's Collection |name = Artisanal Vase |description = Handcrafted to hold your favorite flowers. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Blooming Vase Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Fantasmical Collection |name = Blooming Vase |description = An enchanting way to display your bouquet. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Spooky Stump Vase Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Hallowed Nighst Collection |name = Spooky Stump Vase |description = Add a spooky touch to your floral arrangement. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Parlor Vase Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Parlor's Collection |name = Parlor Vase |description = A simple vase that lets your flowers take center stage. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Cawnival Vase Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Cawnival Collection |name = Cawnival Vase |description = Let the festivities shine on through the night! }} {{SkinInfo |image = A Singular Vase Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Rose Collection |name = A Singular Vase |description = A single rose for simplistic beauty. }}
== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The Table Vase was introduced in the ''[[From Beyond#Host of Horrors|Host of Horrors]]'' update. * If you try to burn a vase with a flower, the flower will immediately wither. To get a wilted flower in a vase instantly, you can first set the vase on fire with a [[torch]], and then extinguish it with a [[Watering Can|watering can]]. * At the beginning all flowers in a Table Vase were wilting after 10 days. This was changed in a hotfix shortly after the release of the ''Host of Horrors'' update to only affect Light Bulbs and Glow Berries. == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == Table Vase Dropped.png|Table Vase Empty Table Vase with Rose.png|Table Vase With Rose Replica Sanctum Vase Dropped.png|Replica Sanctum Vase Dropped Replica Sanctum Planter Dropped.png|Replica Sanctum Planter Dropped Spooky Stump Vase Dropped.png|Spooky Stump Vase Dropped Parlor Vase Dropped.png|Parlor Vase Dropped Cawnival Vase Dropped.png|Cawnival Vase Dropped A Singular Vase Dropped.png|A Singular Vase Dropped =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Table_Vase_on_Round_Wooden_Table.png|Table Vase on Round Wooden Table Table_Vase_All_Flower_Variants.png|able Vase all Flower variants Table_Vase_All_Flower_Variants_Withered.png|Table Vase all Flower variants withered RWP FB3 2 Table Lamp Concept Art.png|Table Vase concept art from ''Rhymes with Play'' RWP FB3 2 Empty Frame Concept Art.png|Table Vase skins concept art from ''Rhymes with Play'' {{clear}} {{Craftable Items}} [[Category:From Beyond]] [[Category:Decorations Filter]] [[Category:Carpentry Filter]] [[vi:Table Vase]]
